jsonLd.title: FreeCharge is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!
